Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Paul Silver, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Jan-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Defendants Petition For Order To Arbitrate And For Dismissal Or Stay Of Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearancs:
Loyst P. Fletcher, Esq. of the Law Office of Loyst P. Fletcher, 424.231.2864, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance by any other party or counsel.

Matter called. Brief comments by Mr. Fletcher.

Ruling: At the conclusion of Mr. Fletcher's comments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on the NOTICE OF HEARING ON DEFENDANTS' PETITION FOR ORDER TO ARBITRATE AND FOR DISMISSAL OR STAY OF ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION as follows: The petition to order arbitration and for dismissal is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is to prepare a form of order that repeats verbatim the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)
